home.title: FlourFlour BAKERY | A Quiet Taste of Tamsui. — a Tamsui riverside bakery
home.description: A small bakery in an old shophouse on Tamsui's Zhongzheng Road. Tangzhong toast, croissants and pastries, finished slowly with longan blossom honey from Sanzhi.

story.title: Our Story | FlourFlour BAKERY
story.description: The river, the flour, the flower, the fold, the light — five chapters on how we bake beside the Tamsui River.

products.title: Products | FlourFlour BAKERY
products.description: Classic breads, seasonal specials and pastries, made with longan blossom honey from Sanzhi and local ingredients, baked in small daily batches.

service.title: Customer Service | FlourFlour BAKERY
service.description: How to order, storage tips, and frequently asked questions. Can't find your answer? Call us or message us on LINE.

contact.title: Contact Us | FlourFlour BAKERY
contact.description: Find FlourFlour BAKERY's address, phone number, opening hours and contact form. Visits and phone orders are welcome.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | FlourFlour BAKERY
privacy.description: How FlourFlour BAKERY collects, uses and protects your personal data.

announcement.text: Store hours will be adjusted 7/21–7/22 — see our LINE account for details.

hero.subtitle: The light of Tamsui, folded into every layer.

manifesto.heading: An ordinary day, baked into one worth remembering.
manifesto.body: The river drifts quietly by; the light settles soft and low. With time alone, we fold each layer of croissant into a memory worth carrying home.

signature.name: Taiwanese Youtiao Danish
signature.body: Laminated in the French style, baked until it cracks at first bite, still damp with butter beneath. Served with warm almond tea — our nod to the breakfast stalls of old Tamsui Old Street.

place.title: An old house by the river
place.body: The shop lives in an old shophouse on Zhongzheng Road, its wooden windows facing the ferry pier. At half past five, the sunset walks in along the river and rests on the bread shelves for fifteen minutes.

gift.heading: A gift from Tamsui
gift.body: Crisp shortbread sandwiched with a custard, salted egg yolk and cheese filling — milk on the first bite, then the savoury depth of salted yolk and cheese: a rich, balanced play of salt and sweet.

visit.heading: Come sit with us
visit.addressValue: No. 123, Zhongzheng Rd., Tamsui Dist., New Taipei City

chapters.title: Where we wait with the tide
chapters.body: In 2024 we lit our first oven lamp beside the Tamsui River. The tides taught us to wait — for dough to wake, and for the best light of the day.

chapters.title: A conversation with wheat
chapters.body: Japanese flour and Taiwanese wheat, each for what it does best. Tangzhong made the night before; long, cold fermentation. The conversation between wheat and yeast cannot be hurried.

chapters.title: Sweetness shaped like a flower
chapters.body: Our brand flower is drawn from petals, the setting sun, and the water's surface. In the recipes, it is longan blossom honey from Sanzhi — replacing part of the sugar, so sweetness takes the shape of a flower.

chapters.title: Twenty-seven layers
chapters.body: A croissant's twenty-seven layers come from three letter folds. The butter must stay cold, the hands must move fast — the air folded in becomes sound when it leaves the oven.

chapters.title: Fifteen minutes of sunset
chapters.body: At half past five the sunset comes in along the river and rests on the bread shelves for fifteen minutes. We keep that light for the day's last bake.

story.quote: Flour, flower, and the light off the river.

products.footnote: Daily quantities are limited — reservations by phone are recommended.

items.name: Pistachio Croissant
items.description: Twenty-seven buttery layers finished with Sicilian pistachio cream, closing on a warm, nutty note.

items.name: Plain Croissant
items.description: Only butter and time — a pure croissant, folded three by three, crisp air in every layer.

items.name: Chocolate Croissant
items.description: A croissant dusted with cocoa, a lightly bitter chocolate hidden within — sweet, never cloying.

items.name: Longan Honey Tangzhong Toast
items.description: Tangzhong method locks in moisture, with a soft, faintly honeyed sweetness.

items.name: Levain Country Loaf
items.description: Long-fermented natural levain, crackling crust and a chewy, moist crumb.

items.name: Sea Salt Croissant
items.description: Buttery French croissant finished with sea salt, flaky layers of sweet and salty.

items.name: Whole Wheat Walnut
items.description: Whole wheat flour with toasted walnuts, earthy grain flavour with a nutty crunch.

items.name: Sunset Apricot Danish
items.description: Golden apricots over crisp danish pastry, like sunset settling onto bread.

items.name: Longan Blossom Honey Bagel
items.description: Dense, chewy bagel folded with longan blossom honey for a natural sweetness.

items.name: Fig Country Loaf
items.description: Dried figs baked into a country dough, rich fruit flavour and hearty texture.

items.name: Osmanthus Chestnut Bread
items.description: Fragrant osmanthus with soft chestnut filling, a taste of autumn.

items.name: Longan Honey Madeleine
items.description: Shell-shaped madeleine with buttery aroma and a lingering note of longan honey.

items.name: Rose Lychee Dacquoise
items.description: Almond meringue layered with rose and lychee cream, delicate and elegant.

items.name: Rice Flour Chiffon
items.description: Made with rice flour for a light, soft crumb — a gluten-free option.

items.name: Brown Sugar Financier
items.description: Caramelised brown sugar folded into buttery cake, moist and richly aromatic.

orderingItems.question: How do I place an order?
orderingItems.answer: Call us at 02-2621-XXXX during business hours, or message our LINE account @flourflour. We'll confirm a pickup time as soon as possible.

orderingItems.question: Do you ship?
orderingItems.answer: Our shelf-stable pastries (madeleines, dacquoise, chiffon, financiers) can be shipped; breads are pickup-only for now to ensure freshness.

orderingItems.question: Can I place a bulk order?
orderingItems.answer: For wedding favours, corporate gifts and other bulk orders, please call or message us on LINE at least 3 days in advance so we can plan the bake and pickup time.

productItems.question: Storage and shelf life
productItems.answer: Bread is best kept at room temperature and enjoyed the day of purchase or the next day; shelf-stable pastries keep refrigerated for 3–5 days and taste best brought back to room temperature.

productItems.question: Allergen information
productItems.answer: Our products may contain gluten, egg, dairy and nuts. Please ask our staff in store, or let us know when ordering so we can help confirm ingredients.

productItems.question: Do you have vegan options?
productItems.answer: Most of our products currently contain butter, honey and similar ingredients, so we don't yet offer fully vegan options. Please contact us before ordering if you have dietary restrictions.

orderInfo.heading: Ordering Notes
orderInfo.pickupValue: Please collect your order within the agreed time window; uncollected orders may be held or cancelled at our discretion.
orderInfo.cancellationValue: Please cancel at least one day before pickup. Same-day cancellations or no-shows are non-refundable.

contact.addressValue: No. 123, Zhongzheng Rd., Tamsui Dist., New Taipei City (near Tamsui Old Street / riverside)

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lastUpdated: This policy template was drafted by AI based on common industry practice. We recommend legal review before launch.

sections.heading: Scope
sections.body: This policy explains how the FlourFlour BAKERY website ("this website") collects, processes and uses the personal data you provide to us. It does not apply to any linked website outside this domain, nor to any party not authorized or engaged by this website.

sections.heading: How We Collect Personal Data, and What We Collect
sections.body: When you contact us through the "Contact Us" form on this website, we collect the name, phone number, email address and message content you provide. If you contact us by phone or our LINE account and place an order, we also receive the contact and pickup details you give us so we can plan the bake and arrange collection.

sections.heading: Purpose of Collection
sections.body: This information is used solely to respond to your inquiry, confirm and arrange your order, coordinate pickup, and — where you have agreed — provide you with product and service information. It is never used beyond these purposes.

sections.heading: Retention Period
sections.body: Your personal data is retained for a reasonable period after your inquiry or order is completed, after which it is deleted or de-identified as required.

sections.heading: How We Protect Your Data
sections.body: We apply reasonable safeguards to protect your personal data. Only authorized staff who are bound by confidentiality obligations may access it, and any third-party providers we engage (such as website hosting or email services) are held to the same confidentiality standard.

sections.heading: Links to Other Websites
sections.body: Links on this website to Instagram, our LINE account, and other external platforms are governed by each platform's own privacy policy, not this one. Please review the privacy policy of any external site before providing information there.

sections.heading: Sharing Data with Third Parties
sections.body: We will never provide, exchange, rent, or sell your personal data to any other individual, organization, private business, or government agency, except with your prior written consent or as otherwise required by law.

sections.heading: Use of Cookies
sections.body: This website does not currently use analytics or advertising trackers, and does not use cookies to collect your browsing behavior. Should we add such tools in a future update, we will announce it here alongside a revised policy.

sections.heading: Accessing, Correcting, and Deleting Your Data
sections.body: You may at any time contact us below to request access to, a copy of, or a correction to your personal data, or to request that we stop collecting, processing or using it. We will respond to your request within a reasonable time.

sections.heading: Changes to This Policy
sections.body: This policy may be revised as laws or our services change. Any revisions will be posted on this page, so please check back periodically.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For any questions about this policy or your personal data, please email hello@flourflour.com.tw or call 02-2621-XXXX.
